label: hug
groundingNote: someone does something of one kind to someone else with the two {urn:molecule-v0:hand|hands} [m]: the two bodies touch for a short time; someone does it when this someone feels something very good toward this other someone; because of it, the other someone can feel something good
notes: Affection-gesture molecule; arms rendered via hands [m] (arm unminted; 'arm' classified transitively).
